title: SuperBrain FC Controller | Control Applications
content_html:
Superbrain FC Visit the Nachshon blower units

SuperBrain FC is a programmable controller that has been designed
Especially for controlling air conditioners, blower units, AW units
VAV units and more.

SuperBrain FC is the optimal solution for unit control
Air conditioning with several fan speed settings, heater control
Control of hot / cold water taps and motorized blinds.
